text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Repeated connections to WinRM port (5985) combined with modifications to the HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections registry key. While svchost.exe is a legitimate Windows process, this combination of actions can be indicative of malicious remote management, proxy configuration, or persistence mechanisms.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "WinRM",
    "port 5985",
    "Internet Settings",
    "registry modification",
    "wmidcom.dll",
    "dpapi.dll"
  ]
}
